name: Azure Terraform Infrastructure
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y pipx curl ca-certificates && if ! command -v az >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -sL https://aka.ms/InstallAzureCLIDeb | sudo bash; fi && pipx ensurepath && pipx install pre-commit && curl -LO "https://dl.k8s.io/release/stable.txt" && KUBECTL_VERSION=$(cat stable.txt) && curl -LO "https://dl.k8s.io/release/${KUBECTL_VERSION}/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl" && sudo install -o root -g root -m 0755 kubectl /usr/local/bin/kubectl && rm kubectl stable.txt && terraform -version && az version && kubectl version --client && ./scripts/tf.sh fmt-check || true
